nodes.name: Hook-billed bulbul
nodes.summary: Hook-billed bulbul（Setornis criniger）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Hook-billed bulbul。

nodes.name: Hook-billed bulbul
nodes.summary: The hook-billed bulbul (Setornis criniger) is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is found in eastern Sumatra and Borneo, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical swamps. It is threatened by habitat loss. Alternate names for the hook-billed bulbul include the long hook-billed bulbul and long-billed bulbul. While currently monotypic within the genus Setornis, originally the genus contained the hairy-backed bulbul (now Tricholestes criniger viridis). References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
